name: noc-idaas
description: German eID and IAM projection readiness companion for regulated NoC workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Prepare German eID verification and IAM projection workflows with NoC guardrails.
interface.longDescription: Local IDaaS companion for planning German eID verification through AusweisApp, verified-claim minimization, consent and audit evidence, and IAM projection readiness for Entra ID, Oracle IAM, and SCIM targets. It creates plan previews and metadata-only evidence; it does not run production eID or IAM writes without a reviewed connector and human approval.
defaultPrompt: Prepare an eID verification readiness plan.
Review IAM projection readiness for a tenant.
Create metadata-only evidence for an IDaaS flow.
